examples.title: Basic textarea
examples.description: Multi-line text input with label and bound value.

examples.title: Textarea with error
examples.description: Validation error wired via aria-invalid and aria-describedby.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { Textarea } from '@lostgradient/cinder/textarea';
  let message = $state('');
  const hasError = $derived(message.length > 0 && message.length < 20);
</script>

<Textarea
  id="message"
  bind:value={message}
  label="Message"
  rows={5}
  placeholder="Write at least 20 characters…"
  {...hasError ? { error: 'Minimum 20 characters.' } : {}}
/>
